zh-cn.humanRaceAddon_Android_Nikke_tooltip:
为了容纳人类思维，在制作上更贴近人类外观的仿生人。
尽管战力远超常人，%%humanRaceAddon_Android_Nikke%%仍需要与正常人类相似的生活环境，以此维持自身的精神安定。
STR+10 CON+10 基础服从度+1

en-us.humanRaceAddon_Android_Nikke_tooltip:
An android created to be closer to the human appearance in order to accommodate human thought.
Although their combat power far exceeds that of ordinary people, %%humanRaceAddon_Android_Nikke%% still require a living environment similar to that of normal humans in order to maintain their mental stability.
STR+10, CON+10, Base Obedience +1
